title: Knautia montenegrina
taxonomy: Knautia montenegrina is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Caprifoliaceae. It belongs to the genus Knautia, a group of flowering plants commonly known as the Venus's carpsingers. Knautia montenegrina is a species of flowering plant that is endemic to Montenegro. The classification of Knautia montenegrina is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its small white flowers and delicate foliage.
